{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heaven’s Drops
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Heaven’s Drops]] are four transparent gray-green orbs wrapped in rings of [[Forged]] script that can improve cycling quality.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Heaven's Drops appear gray and dull in the air.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
